reviews.review_description:
One thing is I really love this, and it works with other passive apps like RDP. However, I find that sometimes it pauses and has issues when a controller isn’t in the field of view. I wish there was a way you could lock the app and prevent the quest from trying to click other things. Otherwise if you put a controller in the room and can see it, it’s fine. 

I do wish there was actual 3D content / movies though.
We need a way to stream 3d movies!!
…bring Wicked 3D to Quest and earn that fifth star. 💚
I launched it and I logged in to my peacock account and it was amazing I loved theater mode and it works best if u already have a peacock account ❤️

The Olympics looked horrible on Quest. All pixilated and blurry.  Looks much better om my regular 55" TV.  

Needs to stream higher quality and have AI upscaling. Why would I put on a cumbersome headset unless watching was a better experience than on a TV.
I am unable to log in. Resetting my password does not remedy the problem.👎🏽
￼ finally now I can watch 2024 Olympics😃

reviews.review_title: The Olympics is better on VR than TV
reviews.review_description: Actually, like feel like you’re there ￼

I only got Peacock for The Office. I installed it on my Meta Quest 3 and it plays with no problem with the picture. I like how I can expand the screen display like a home theater. The only problem I get sometimes I gotta reinstall the app the get it to work again.
Not much else to say, it works and does a decent job.
Can’t log in
It’s a little difficult to login, but it lets people like me watch wrestling in vr.
Awfull app

reviews.review_title: Bottom menu bar won’t go away
reviews.review_description: I bought the Peacock app for quest 2. when I watch shows or movies in full screen there is a bottom menu bar below the video that does not go away. It’s frustrating watching a dark movie and seeing the bright menu bar right below it.

reviews.review_title: No way to hide Quest menu while watching
reviews.review_description:
EDIT: I was wrong below, so I give this a 5-star review. (I should have known better!) After starting a video on Peacock, at the bottom right of the screen, there's a full screen icon that opens the more immersive view of whatever you're watching.
-----------

The whole time you're watching content on Peacock TV, the main Meta Quest menu is displayed, as well as your Quest environment. 

It would be nice if there would be a darkened environment in the background, such as with Netflix's VR app. Best of all would be if the background went black, like YouTube's VR app does.

Downloaded your app because I was informed by meta that I was receiving a few days free. Lies, the only thing available are paid packages in the app. Funny how all your five star reviews have no hours in their activity feed with your app.
Peacock is here and it's wonderful. The app is great. It run smoothly and is very similar to the mobile interface.
The app works fine if you already have a Peacock account, it may have issues depending on the user but I assure you that it’s working well.
I love this app!! I am so happy it's on the quest 2!!! It let's me watch while laying down by putting screen on top!!

reviews.review_title: It works a lot like a streaming app.
reviews.review_description: It is no super VR experience, it's just a pop up screen. That's perfectly fine because it has TV. I think there are a few good free movies and shows that don't require subscription.
